Back to project

Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy for Language Flag Indicator

Effective date: April 5, 2026

Language Flag Indicator ("the app", "we", "us", or "our") is a Windows
application that displays the current input language as a tray icon.

This Privacy Policy explains what information the app processes, how that
information is used, where it is stored, and what choices you have.

Summary

- The app is designed to work locally on your device.
- The app does not require an account.
- The app does not sell your personal information.
- The app does not display advertising.
- The app does not send your data to our servers.
- The app stores limited settings on your device to support app behavior.

Information The App Processes

1. Input language and keyboard layout information

The app detects the current input language and keyboard layout associated
with the active window in order to display the correct tray icon.

This may include:

- current input language tag;
- keyboard layout identifier;
- locale information derived from the active input method.

2. Foreground window technical identifiers

To determine which input language is currently active, the app may read
technical information about the foreground window, including:

- window handle values;
- thread identifiers associated with the foreground window.

The app uses this information only to resolve the current input language on
the device.

3. App settings stored locally

The app stores limited preferences on your device, including:

- whether the first-run experience has been completed;
- the app language selected by the user.

These settings are stored locally using Windows app storage.

Information The App Does Not Intentionally Collect

The app is not designed to collect or transmit:

- your name, email address, phone number, or postal address;
- account credentials;
- payment information;
- contacts, photos, documents, or media files;
- precise location data;
- browsing history;
- analytics or advertising identifiers.

The app is also not designed to transmit the contents of what you type.
Its purpose is to detect the current input language and show it visually.

How We Use Information

The app uses locally processed information to:

- detect the current input language;
- display the appropriate tray icon;
- remember limited app preferences;
- support the optional launch-at-sign-in feature through Windows.

Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.

The app does not send your data to our servers.

The app may interact with Windows platform components that are required for
the app to run, install, update, or provide operating-system-integrated
features. Those platform components are governed by Microsoft's terms and
privacy practices.

Third-Party Services and Platform Components

The app is distributed through Microsoft Store and runs on Windows platform
components, including Windows App SDK and related Microsoft software
dependencies.

When you install, update, or use the app through Microsoft Store or Windows,
Microsoft may process certain information under Microsoft's own privacy
terms. For more information, review Microsoft's privacy documentation.

Data Retention

User preference data remains on the device until:

- you change or reset the relevant setting;
- the app is uninstalled;
- app data is cleared by the user or the operating system.

Your Choices

You can:

- uninstall the app at any time through Windows;
- disable launch at sign-in through the app or Windows settings;
- change the app language in the app settings;
- clear app data through Windows tools where available.

Security

We take reasonable steps in the app design to limit data processing to what
is necessary for the app's function and to keep stored data local to the
device. However, no software or storage mechanism can be guaranteed to be
completely secure.

International Users

If you use the app outside your home country or region, your use of
Microsoft Store or Windows platform services may involve data handling by
Microsoft under its own terms and policies.

Changes To This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make material
changes, we will update the effective date at the top of this document.

Contact

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact:

Publisher: Artem Ryzhov
Contact email: artem.rizhov@gmail.com
